author: felix314159_
content: sry had to send as txt file to dodge dc message size limit. basically i get 9 passed / 8 failed when reproducing and i think all failures are on besu side (some are caused by u having 8037 active which is not ideal when we want to test focil as isolated as possible). lmk if this helps

author: fab_10
content: Thanks <@510888004366368794> I will try to reproduce locally. Which is the HF and/or EIP to use for testing FOCIL is still an open question, I hope we can found a common ground at the interop

author: felix314159_
content: if u can give me a besu branch with BAL+slotnum+focil (nothing else, no 8037 etc) it would help us both. the reason being that the script i ran for merging all these eips together is relatively new and as-of-today only merge-conflict-free without 8037

author: fab_10
content: let's discuss this at the interop, currently I am implementing FOCIL on Bogotà so FcUV5 and newPayloadV6, other clients could have different setups, so we need to agree on what to include or not

author: fab_10
content: if I run the instructions as reported, then I end up with an empty `fixtures` dir, to fill it I did `git checkout eips/amsterdam/eip-7805` before running `uv run fill -v -s --no-html --clean ./tests/amsterdam/eip7805_focil --until=amsterdam` is that correct?

author: felix314159_
content: if u exactly followed the txt file i sent then after running the devnet script command u do `git checkout devnets/bal/5` , the name is arbitrary i just used 5 to avoid collision with an existing branch. so all other command have to be run on that freshly created 'devnet' branch
